---
title: "Why we switched from Kafka to SQS"
author: "Acme Engineering"
date: "2026-05-08"
format: html
---

## TL;DR
SQS saved $1.5k/mo + 30% engineer time with negligible throughput cost.

## Background
Our order pipeline ran on self-hosted Kafka...

## Migration
6 weeks · zero downtime. See [ADR-042](../slidev-architecture-review/) for the decision.

## Lessons
- managed > self-hosted unless you genuinely need 100k msg/s
- DLQ ergonomics matter as much as throughput
